storage_location.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tblProducts.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["storage_location"])) : storage_location })()}}
storage_location.label: Location

strain.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tblProducts.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["strain"])) : strain })()}}
strain.label: Strain

unit.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = tblProducts.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["unit"])) : unit })()}}
unit.label: Unit

children.sourceData: {{ qListFacilitators.data.map(i => ({ label: i.first_name + " " + i.last_name, value: i.member_id })) }}

actionConfiguration.body:
SELECT member_id, first_name, last_name, email, phone
FROM members
WHERE
  (
    -- match first+last (case-insensitive, trimmed)
    lower(trim(first_name)) = lower(trim({{ inpFirstName.text }}))
    AND lower(trim(last_name)) = lower(trim({{ inpLastName.text }}))
  )
  OR (
    -- match email (case-insensitive, trimmed); skip if blank
    {{ inpEmail.text.trim() !== "" }} AND lower(trim(email)) = lower(trim({{ inpEmail.text }}))
  )
  OR (
    -- match phone; skip if blank
    {{ inpPhone.text.trim() !== "" }} AND regexp_replace(phone, '\D', '', 'g') = regexp_replace({{ inpPhone.text }}, '\D', '', 'g')
  )
LIMIT 5;

SELECT member_id, first_name, last_name, email, phone
FROM members
WHERE
  (
    -- match first+last (case-insensitive, trimmed)
    lower(trim(first_name)) = lower(trim({{ inpFirstName.text }}))
    AND lower(trim(last_name)) = lower(trim({{ inpLastName.text }}))
  )
  OR (
    -- match email (case-insensitive, trimmed); skip if blank
    {{ inpEmail.text.trim() !== "" }} AND lower(trim(email)) = lower(trim({{ inpEmail.text }}))
  )
  OR (
    -- match phone; skip if blank
    {{ inpPhone.text.trim() !== "" }} AND regexp_replace(phone, '\D', '', 'g') = regexp_replace({{ inpPhone.text }}, '\D', '', 'g')
  )
LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO members (first_name, last_name, email, phone, date_of_birth, notes, is_facilitator, created_by_facilitator_id)
VALUES (
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpFirstName.text }}'), ''),
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpLastName.text }}'), ''),
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpEmail.text }}'), ''),
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpPhone.text }}'), ''),
  NULLIF('{{ inpDOB.selectedDate }}', '')::DATE,
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpNotes.text }}'), ''),
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpIsFacilitator.isChecked }}'), '')::BOOLEAN,
	NULLIF(TRIM('{{ appsmith.store.facilitator_id }}'), '')::UUID
)
RETURNING member_id;

INSERT INTO members (first_name, last_name, email, phone, date_of_birth, notes, is_facilitator, created_by_facilitator_id)
VALUES (
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpFirstName.text }}'), ''),
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpLastName.text }}'), ''),
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpEmail.text }}'), ''),
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpPhone.text }}'), ''),
  NULLIF('{{ inpDOB.selectedDate }}', '')::DATE,
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpNotes.text }}'), ''),
  NULLIF(TRIM('{{ inpIsFacilitator.isChecked }}'), '')::BOOLEAN,
	NULLIF(TRIM('{{ appsmith.store.facilitator_id }}'), '')::UUID
)
RETURNING member_id;

INSERT INTO member_agreements (
  member_id,
  facilitator_id,
  agreement_template_id,
  signature_method,
  status,
  evidence
)
SELECT
  {{ appsmith.store.new_member_id }}::uuid,
  {{ appsmith.store.selected_facilitator_id }}::uuid,
  agreement_template_id,
  {{ appsmith.store.signature_method }},
  {{ appsmith.store.agreement_status }},
  COALESCE({{ appsmith.store.evidence_json }}::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb)
FROM agreement_templates
WHERE active = true
  AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(required_for)
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1
RETURNING member_agreement_id;

SELECT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  -- latest agreement status (sacrament_release)
  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM member_agreements ma
    JOIN agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(at.required_for)
    ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  -- latest release date (if you have sacrament releases table)
  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM sacrament_releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
LIMIT 300;

SELECT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  -- latest agreement status (sacrament_release)
  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM member_agreements ma
    JOIN agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(at.required_for)
    ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  -- latest release date (if you have sacrament releases table)
  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM sacrament_releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
LIMIT 300;

SELECT
  m.*,
  (
    SELECT jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'member_agreement_id', ma.member_agreement_id,
        'status', ma.status,
        'signature_method', ma.signature_method,
        'created_at', ma.created_at,
        'facilitator_id', ma.facilitator_id
      )
      ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
    )
    FROM member_agreements ma
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS agreements_json
FROM members m
WHERE m.member_id = {{ tblMembers.selectedRow.member_id }}::uuid;

SELECT
  m.*,
  (
    SELECT jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'member_agreement_id', ma.member_agreement_id,
        'status', ma.status,
        'signature_method', ma.signature_method,
        'created_at', ma.created_at,
        'facilitator_id', ma.facilitator_id
      )
      ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
    )
    FROM member_agreements ma
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS agreements_json
FROM members m
WHERE m.member_id = {{ tblMembers.selectedRow.member_id }}::uuid;

UPDATE members
SET status = 'inactive'
WHERE member_id = {{ tblMembers.selectedRow.member_id }}::uuid
RETURNING member_id;

SELECT member_id, email, first_name, last_name, is_document_reviewer
FROM public.members
WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ this.params.email }})
  AND is_facilitator IS TRUE
  AND status = 'active'

SELECT member_id, email, first_name, last_name, is_document_reviewer
FROM public.members
WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ this.params.email }})
  AND is_facilitator IS TRUE
  AND status = 'active'
LIMIT 1;

WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  -- latest agreement status (sacrament_release)
  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM member_agreements ma
    JOIN agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(at.required_for)
    ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  -- latest release date
  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM sacrament_releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  -- Reviewer override: see everyone
  me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE

  -- Otherwise apply facilitator-scoped visibility
  OR (
    me.is_document_reviewer = FALSE
    AND me.member_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      m.created_by_facilitator_id = me.member_id
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.member_agreements ma
        WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
          AND ma.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.sacrament_releases sr
        WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
          AND sr.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name, m.first_name
LIMIT 500;

WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,

  -- latest agreement status (sacrament_release)
  (
    SELECT ma.status

    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(at.required_for)
    ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  -- latest release date
  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM sacrament_releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  -- Reviewer override: see everyone
  me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE

  -- Otherwise apply facilitator-scoped visibility
  OR (
    me.is_document_reviewer = FALSE
    AND me.member_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      m.created_by_facilitator_id = me.member_id
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.member_agreements ma
        WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
          AND ma.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.sacrament_releases sr
        WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id

      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name, m.first_name
LIMIT 500;

SELECT
  ma.member_agreement_id,
  ma.created_at,
  ma.status,
  ma.signature_method,
  ma.member_signed_at,
  ma.facilitator_signed_at,
  ma.opensign_document_id,
  at.name AS template_name,
  ma.facilitator_id,
  ma.evidence,
	ma.review_notes
FROM member_agreements ma
JOIN agreement_templates at
  ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
WHERE ma.member_id = {{appsmith.store.member_id}}::uuid
ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC;

  ma.facilitator_id,
  ma.evidence,
	ma.review_notes
FROM member_agreements ma
JOIN agreement_templates at
  ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
WHERE ma.member_id = {{appsmith.store.member_id}}::uuid
ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC;

WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'

SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  -- latest agreement status (sacrament_release)
  (
    SELECT ma.status

  -- latest release date
  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM sacrament_releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  -- Reviewer override: see everyone
  me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE

  -- Otherwise apply facilitator-scoped visibility
  OR (
    me.is_document_reviewer = FALSE
    AND me.member_id IS NOT NULL

      m.created_by_facilitator_id = me.member_id

UPDATE public.member_agreements
SET
  status = 'signed',
  reviewer_id = {{ appsmith.store.facilitator_id }}::uuid,
  reviewed_at = now(),

WHERE member_agreement_id = {{ this.params.member_agreement_id }}::uuid
RETURNING member_agreement_id;

actionConfiguration.body:
WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  -- latest agreement status (sacrament_release)
  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM member_agreements ma
    JOIN agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(at.required_for)
    ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  -- latest release date
  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM sacrament_releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  -- Reviewer override: see everyone
  me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE

  -- Otherwise apply facilitator-scoped visibility
  OR (
    me.is_document_reviewer = FALSE
    AND me.member_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      m.created_by_facilitator_id = me.member_id
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.member_agreements ma
        WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
          AND ma.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.sacrament_releases sr
        WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
          AND sr.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name, m.first_name
LIMIT 500;

WITH me AS (
  SELECT
    member_id,
    COALESCE(is_document_reviewer, FALSE) AS is_document_reviewer
  FROM public.members
  WHERE lower(email) = lower({{ appsmith.user.email }})
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  m.member_id,
  m.first_name,
  m.last_name,
  m.email,
  m.phone,
  m.status,
  m.is_facilitator,
  m.created_at,

  -- latest agreement status (sacrament_release)
  (
    SELECT ma.status
    FROM member_agreements ma
    JOIN agreement_templates at
      ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
    WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
      AND 'sacrament_release' = ANY(at.required_for)
    ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS latest_release_agreement_status,

  -- latest release date
  (
    SELECT max(sr.released_at)
    FROM sacrament_releases sr
    WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
  ) AS last_release_at

FROM public.members m
CROSS JOIN me
WHERE
  -- Reviewer override: see everyone
  me.is_document_reviewer = TRUE

  -- Otherwise apply facilitator-scoped visibility
  OR (
    me.is_document_reviewer = FALSE
    AND me.member_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      m.created_by_facilitator_id = me.member_id
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.member_agreements ma
        WHERE ma.member_id = m.member_id
          AND ma.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.sacrament_releases sr
        WHERE sr.member_id = m.member_id
          AND sr.facilitator_id = me.member_id
      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY m.last_name, m.first_name
LIMIT 500;

-- qGateCheckAgreement (Postgres)
SELECT
  ma.member_agreement_id,
  ma.agreement_template_id,
  ma.signed_at,
  t.name AS template_name,
  t.version AS template_version
FROM member_agreements ma
JOIN agreement_templates t
  ON t.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
WHERE ma.member_id = {{ this.params.member_id }}::uuid
  AND ma.status = 'signed'
  AND t.active = true
  AND {{ this.params.release_type }} = ANY(t.required_for)
ORDER BY ma.signed_at DESC NULLS LAST, ma.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

-- qGateCheckAgreement (Postgres)
SELECT
  ma.member_agreement_id,
  ma.agreement_template_id,
  ma.signed_at,
  t.name AS template_name,
  t.version AS template_version
FROM member_agreements ma
JOIN agreement_templates t
  ON t.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
WHERE ma.member_id = {{ this.params.member_id }}::uuid
  AND ma.status = 'signed'
  AND t.active = true
  AND {{ this.params.release_type }} = ANY(t.required_for)
ORDER BY ma.signed_at DESC NULLS LAST, ma.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT member_id, first_name, last_name, email
FROM members
WHERE is_facilitator = true
ORDER BY last_name, first_name;

SELECT member_id, first_name, last_name, email
FROM members
WHERE is_facilitator = true
ORDER BY last_name, first_name;

INSERT INTO public.audit_log (
  actor,
  action,
  entity_type,
  entity_id,
  details
)
VALUES (
  NULLIF({{ this.params.actor_email }}, ''),
  {{ this.params.action }},
  {{ this.params.entity_type }},
  COALESCE(NULLIF({{ this.params.entity_id }}, ''), 'unknown'),
  COALESCE({{ this.params.details_json }}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb)
)
RETURNING audit_log_id;
